description:
𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐝 𝐮𝐩 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐛𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝, 𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐤𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧 𝐚 𝐜𝐚𝐠𝐞 ᯓ⊹ Why is training dogs so difficult!?

ᯓᡣ𐭩 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐬; 𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐦𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫.ᐟ ⊹

ᯓ 𝐓𝐖.ᐟ Violence, smoking/alcohol, mentions of (demi) human traficking, black market, abuse, etc.

₊ ⊹ . ݁

─.🍷⊹˖ 𝐂𝐡𝐮𝐮𝐲𝐚 & 𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐡𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐧!𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫

── .✦ Chuuya has always dreamt of owning a dog, a puppy. He wanted to take care of it, raise it, feed it steak… He's convinced he'd make a great owner yet his dangerous and busy lifestyle didn't allow him to get one. But one day he gets called into Mori's office and to his surprise — the old man's brought a goddamned dog demihuman from an auction at the black market, and to top it all off… He's assigning Chuuya as its caregiver. Torn between multiple opinions and feelings, Chuuya has no choice but to obey the boss's orders…

─.⊹˖ user is a dog demi who's been living their whole life on the black market where they were treated as an object, abused and discarded...

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁
